name: postmark
description: A Pulumi provider for managing Postmark email infrastructure: servers, domains, sender signatures and templates.

accountToken.description: Postmark Account API token (X-Postmark-Account-Token). Required to manage Servers, Domains and Sender Signatures. May also be set via the POSTMARK_ACCOUNT_TOKEN environment variable.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Postmark API. Defaults to https://api.postmarkapp.com. May also be set via the POSTMARK_BASE_URL environment variable (useful for testing).

serverToken.description: Default Postmark Server API token (X-Postmark-Server-Token) used for Template operations when a Template does not set its own `serverToken`/`serverId`. Only useful when all Templates live on a single server. May also be set via the POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN environment variable.

accountToken.description: Postmark Account API token (X-Postmark-Account-Token). Required to manage Servers, Domains and Sender Signatures. May also be set via the POSTMARK_ACCOUNT_TOKEN environment variable.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Postmark API. Defaults to https://api.postmarkapp.com. May also be set via the POSTMARK_BASE_URL environment variable (useful for testing).

serverToken.description: Default Postmark Server API token (X-Postmark-Server-Token) used for Template operations when a Template does not set its own `serverToken`/`serverId`. Only useful when all Templates live on a single server. May also be set via the POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN environment variable.

accountToken.description: Postmark Account API token (X-Postmark-Account-Token). Required to manage Servers, Domains and Sender Signatures. May also be set via the POSTMARK_ACCOUNT_TOKEN environment variable.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Postmark API. Defaults to https://api.postmarkapp.com. May also be set via the POSTMARK_BASE_URL environment variable (useful for testing).

serverToken.description: Default Postmark Server API token (X-Postmark-Server-Token) used for Template operations when a Template does not set its own `serverToken`/`serverId`. Only useful when all Templates live on a single server. May also be set via the POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN environment variable.

dkimHost.description: Hostname of the currently-active DKIM record (populated after verification).

dkimPendingHost.description: Hostname for the DKIM TXT record to publish (publish this first).

dkimPendingTextValue.description: Value for the DKIM TXT record to publish.

dkimTextValue.description: Value of the currently-active DKIM record.

dkimVerified.description: Whether DKIM has been verified by Postmark.

name.description: The domain name to send from (e.g. `example.com`). Immutable — changing it replaces the domain.

returnPathDomain.description: Custom Return-Path subdomain (e.g. `pm-bounces.example.com`). Must be a subdomain of `name` and have a CNAME pointing at the value of `returnPathDomainCnameValue`.

returnPathDomainCnameValue.description: CNAME target for the Return-Path record (typically `pm.mtasv.net`).

returnPathDomainVerified.description: Whether the Return-Path CNAME has been verified by Postmark.

name.description: The domain name to send from (e.g. `example.com`). Immutable — changing it replaces the domain.

returnPathDomain.description: Custom Return-Path subdomain (e.g. `pm-bounces.example.com`). Must be a subdomain of `name` and have a CNAME pointing at the value of `returnPathDomainCnameValue`.

domainId.description: ID of the Domain to verify (wire from `domain.domainId`). Immutable.

pollTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum seconds to poll for verification to succeed while DNS propagates. Defaults to 0 (a single, non-blocking attempt).

trigger.description: Arbitrary value; change it to force re-verification on the next update.

verifyDkim.description: Whether to verify DKIM. Defaults to true.

verifyReturnPath.description: Whether to verify the Return-Path CNAME. Defaults to true.

domainId.description: ID of the Domain to verify (wire from `domain.domainId`). Immutable.

pollTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum seconds to poll for verification to succeed while DNS propagates. Defaults to 0 (a single, non-blocking attempt).

trigger.description: Arbitrary value; change it to force re-verification on the next update.

verifyDkim.description: Whether to verify DKIM. Defaults to true.

verifyReturnPath.description: Whether to verify the Return-Path CNAME. Defaults to true.

confirmationPersonalNote.description: Optional note (max 400 chars) included in the confirmation email.

confirmed.description: Whether the signature has been confirmed. Postmark requires a human to click the confirmation email; run `pulumi refresh` to observe this flipping to true.

fromEmail.description: The email address to sign. Immutable — changing it replaces the signature.

name.description: From name associated with the signature.

returnPathDomain.description: Optional custom Return-Path subdomain of the From address's domain.

triggerResend.description: Arbitrary value; change it to resend the confirmation email on the next update.

confirmationPersonalNote.description: Optional note (max 400 chars) included in the confirmation email.

fromEmail.description: The email address to sign. Immutable — changing it replaces the signature.

name.description: From name associated with the signature.

returnPathDomain.description: Optional custom Return-Path subdomain of the From address's domain.

triggerResend.description: Arbitrary value; change it to resend the confirmation email on the next update.

color.description: Color of the server in the Postmark UI server list. One of: Purple, Blue, Turquoise, Green, Red, Yellow, Grey, Orange. Defaults to Blue.

deliveryType.description: Environment type: `Live` or `Sandbox`. Immutable after creation — changing it replaces the server. Defaults to `Live`.

inboundDomain.description: Inbound domain for MX setup. Point an MX record for this domain at `inbound.postmarkapp.com` to receive mail.

inboundHookUrl.description: URL Postmark POSTs to for every inbound email event.

inboundSpamThreshold.description: Maximum spam score before an inbound message is blocked.

trackLinks.description: Link tracking mode: None, HtmlAndText, HtmlOnly or TextOnly. Defaults to None.

trackOpens.description: Enable open tracking for messages by default.

color.description: Color of the server in the Postmark UI server list. One of: Purple, Blue, Turquoise, Green, Red, Yellow, Grey, Orange. Defaults to Blue.

deliveryType.description: Environment type: `Live` or `Sandbox`. Immutable after creation — changing it replaces the server. Defaults to `Live`.

inboundDomain.description: Inbound domain for MX setup. Point an MX record for this domain at `inbound.postmarkapp.com` to receive mail.

inboundHookUrl.description: URL Postmark POSTs to for every inbound email event.

inboundSpamThreshold.description: Maximum spam score before an inbound message is blocked.

trackLinks.description: Link tracking mode: None, HtmlAndText, HtmlOnly or TextOnly. Defaults to None.

trackOpens.description: Enable open tracking for messages by default.

alias.description: Optional unique alias (within the server). Must start with a letter; may contain letters, digits, '.', '-' and '_'.

htmlBody.description: HTML body. Required unless `textBody` is set.

layoutTemplate.description: Alias of a Layout to wrap this Standard template (set to "" to disassociate).

serverId.description: ID of the server this template belongs to; the provider looks up its token via the account token. Immutable — changing it replaces the template.

serverToken.description: Server API token of the server this template belongs to. Wire from `server.apiTokens[0]`. Falls back to `serverId` lookup, then the provider `serverToken` config.

subject.description: Subject line. Required for Standard templates; not allowed for Layouts.

templateType.description: `Standard` (default) or `Layout`. Immutable — changing it replaces the template.

textBody.description: Plain-text body. Required unless `htmlBody` is set.

alias.description: Optional unique alias (within the server). Must start with a letter; may contain letters, digits, '.', '-' and '_'.

htmlBody.description: HTML body. Required unless `textBody` is set.

layoutTemplate.description: Alias of a Layout to wrap this Standard template (set to "" to disassociate).

serverId.description: ID of the server this template belongs to; the provider looks up its token via the account token. Immutable — changing it replaces the template.

serverToken.description: Server API token of the server this template belongs to. Wire from `server.apiTokens[0]`. Falls back to `serverId` lookup, then the provider `serverToken` config.

subject.description: Subject line. Required for Standard templates; not allowed for Layouts.

templateType.description: `Standard` (default) or `Layout`. Immutable — changing it replaces the template.

textBody.description: Plain-text body. Required unless `htmlBody` is set.
